import sqlite3

con = sqlite3.connect(":memory:")
con.executescript('create table pairs(id text); create table dec(pair_id text); insert into pairs values ("p1"),("p2"); insert into dec values ("p1");')
missing = [r[0] for r in con.execute(

)]
print(missing)

import sqlite3

con = sqlite3.connect(":memory:")
con.execute('create table e(id text primary key, name text)')
con.execute("insert into e values ('1','A')")
con.execute(
    "insert into e(id, name) values ('1','B') on conflict(id) do update set name=excluded.name"
)
